channel.title: Post page on reload getting server error: 404
channel.description:
Hello Frontity Community! As i try to open the post on other tab or on reload of single post than it is giving server error 404. On running command frontity.state.source.get("/2022/01/its-the-rules-stupid/117034/") in browser console it's giving error as : 1. errorStatus: 404 2. errorStatusText: "post type from endpoints \"media\" with slug \"117034\" not found" 1. is404: true 2. isError: true 3. isFetching: false 4. isReady: true 5. link: "/2022/01/its-the-rules-stupid/117034/"
- A repository with the code of my project https://bitbucket.org/tenzinchemi/reacthillpost/src/2020Theme/ branch 2020Theme
The URL of your WP REST API is https://hillpost.in/

item.title: Post page on reload getting server error: 404
item.dc:creator: tenzin.chemi
item.description:
Hello Frontity Community!
As i try to open the post on other tab or on reload of single post than it is giving server error 404.
On running command frontity.state.source.get("/2022/01/its-the-rules-stupid/117034/") in browser console it’s giving error as :

  1. errorStatus: 404
  2. errorStatusText: “post type from endpoints “media” with slug “117034” not found”
  3. is404: true
  4. isError: true
  5. isFetching: false
  6. isReady: true
  7. link: “/2022/01/its-the-rules-stupid/117034/”
  • A repository with the code of my project
    Log in with Atlassian account
    branch 2020Theme

The URL of your WP REST API is https://hillpost.in/

Read full topic
item.source: Post page on reload getting server error: 404
